title: Surge in US petrol prices deepens political peril for Trump over Iran
summary_full: The odds of a quick resolution to the war appear to be dwindling by the day, and the political stakes for the president are only growing.
summary_public: The odds of a quick resolution to the war appear to be dwindling by the day, and the political stakes for the president are only growing.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Surge in US petrol prices deepens political peril for Trump over Iran
